description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a fitted blouse and a knee-length pencil skirt. The figure has long hair styled in a low ponytail, and is wearing high-heeled shoes. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, with hands and fingers splayed in a T-pose. The facial features are defined, and the posture is upright and symmetrical. The clothing is form-fitting, emphasizing a professional appearance suitable for an urban or office environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A formally dressed adult woman in a business outfit with a blouse, pencil skirt, and high heels, standing upright with arms extended in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, blouse details, and the full front of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the side silhouette of the outfit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the blouse, skirt, ponytail, and both heels.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, ponytail, and the right side of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: formal blouse and knee-length pencil skirt with high-heeled shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in a low ponytail
